Tap requests

No incoming TAPD card requests yet.

1. They tap you → public TAPD profile opens.
2. They send their TAPD card → request appears here.
3. You accept → allowed details unlock and the person moves to Needs capture.
4. You capture → AI prepares the next-step draft for manual sending.

Owner Profile controls
TAPDconnex

Set up your TAPD profile

This takes 60 seconds. Your NFC card will show this to people you meet.

Set your follow-up style once

TAPD will reuse your greeting, wording and sign-off every time it prepares a message. The details in brackets are locked because TAPD fills them in after each capture.

[First name]locked — TAPD fills this automatically.

[Where we met]locked — this comes from the event/session context.

[What we discussed]locked — AI fills this from the capture.

[Next step]locked — AI fills this after transcription.

[My name]locked — pulled from your profile name.

Preview with sample details

✓

Your card is live!

Share this link with your NFC tag or directly. Every tap opens your profile.

Your profile link

tapd.app/yourname

Program this exact URL onto your NFC card — every tap will open your live profile.

How to program your NFC card — 3 steps

1

Download NFC Tools

Free app on iOS & Android. Search "NFC Tools" by wakdev.

🍎 App Store 🤖 Google Play
2

Write your URL to the tag

In NFC Tools: tap Write → Add a record → URL / URI → paste your profile link → Write / OK → hold phone to tag.

3

Test it

Lock your phone, hold it near the tag — your profile should open instantly. If it asks, choose "Open in browser".

🔒

Your data stays on this device

All captures, contacts, and follow-up drafts are saved in your browser's local storage. They don't leave your device unless you export them. Avoid clearing browser data without exporting first.

✦ You tapped my tag

Your data

Export everything

Download all your captures, connections, and profile data as JSON. TAPDconnex does not own your network — take it with you any time.

Clear local data

Remove all data stored on this device. Your profile on the server is not affected. Use this to reset a shared device.

✦ NFC Connect

🎤 Mic needs HTTPS

Recording works when hosted (Vercel, localhost, any server). Right now use Type it instead below — everything else works identically.

Capture the moment

Speak naturally — who you met, what was discussed, what happens next.

Tap to record

Starter records up to 5 minutes. Pro unlocks 10-minute AI captures, all templates, Conversation Completeness, analytics, and export.

Different places have different recording rules. You are responsible for informing people where required. Responsible Recording

Owner profile controls

Update the public TAPD profile people see when they tap your NFC card. These fields feed the public card, contact links, capture context, and follow-up flow.

Identity

Optional. If empty, initials are shown.

Audio memory anchor

No audio uploaded

Recognition layer

Relevance statement

Social and contact links

Top focus

Portfolio / ways to work together

Profile link

NFC tag URL preview

/your-username?nfc=1

My Template

My Follow-Up Voice: Edit the relationship pathway fields and the message wording TAPD uses after each capture. You write normal message text; TAPD fills the bracketed details like [First name], [Where we met], [What we discussed], and [Next step].

Owner Tools

Profile completion 0%
1

Who you are

This is what people see when they tap your NFC card.

This is the first thing someone reads. Make it specific.

2

How you help

What you offer and who it's for. This is what makes someone think "that's me."

These are the lines that make someone stop scrolling and think "that's exactly my situation."

1
2
3
4
5

Your current initiative, launch, or offer. Gives visitors something to engage with immediately.

3

How to reach you

Where should people go after they tap your card?

Used for the "Continue on WhatsApp" button and AI follow-up sending.

This tells visitors the best way to reach you after connecting.

4

Your follow-up voice

Set this once. TAPDconnex uses it every time it prepares a message after a capture.

The bracketed parts like [First name] are filled in automatically from each capture — don't change them. Everything else is your voice.

[First name] filled automatically from your capture.

[Where we met] comes from the session context you set before capturing.

[What we discussed] extracted by AI from your recording.

[Next step] extracted by AI from what was agreed in the conversation.

[My name] pulled from your name above.

Preview with sample details

5

NFC card setup

Program your physical NFC card to open your profile on tap.

Lowercase letters and hyphens only. This becomes your profile URL.

Your NFC tag URL

tapd.app/yourname?nfc=1

This is the profile URL to program onto your NFC card. Every tap opens this live TAPD profile.

How to program your NFC card — 3 steps

1

Download NFC Tools

Free app on iOS & Android. Search "NFC Tools" by wakdev.

🍎 App Store 🤖 Google Play
2

Write your URL to the card

In NFC Tools: tap Write → Add a record → URL / URI → paste your profile link → Write / OK → hold phone to the card.

3

Test it

Lock your phone and hold it near the tag. Your profile should open instantly. If prompted, choose "Open in browser".
